noAdventurer: 🖋 Can’t retire what’s not recorded. **{name}** isn’t in the ledger.

title: Closing the Ledger: {name}
Final Entry Filed: {name}
Quil Archives {name}
Ink Dried, Page Turned: {name}
Record Sealed: {name}
userNotice: 🖋 I’ve archived: **{name}**’s character sheet below for your records.
🖋 For posterity: **{name}**’s final sheet is attached below.
🖋 The complete record for: **{name}** final sheet has been preserved below.
🖋 Archival copy of: **{name}**’s sheet is included for your ledger.
🖋 Filed under ‘Retired’: **{name}**. See the embed below.
description: With a neat stroke, I mark **{name}** as retired. The adventures don’t disappear—they simply settle into the margins where legends live. Thank you for the stories; I’ll keep the record legible.
The page has been turned for **{name}**. No spills, no smudges—just a clean close on a well-worn chapter. Should the road call again, the index will remember where you left off.
I’ve sealed **{name}**’s entry and pressed the ribbon flat. What follows is memory, what remains is record. When you’re ready for a new beginning, I’ll have fresh parchment waiting.
Final totals tallied; **{name}** is archived with care. Your quests echo between these lines, and the ledger is better for it. Rest easy—your numbers add up to something brave.
Ink dried; **{name}** joins the guild’s quiet gallery. The feats are etched, the coin accounted, the tales intact. New quills, new chapters await when you’re ready.
All columns balanced and the signature set: **{name}** retires with dignity. The story holds, the math checks, the memories stay crisp. I’ll be here when the next name arrives.
footer: 🖋 Logged by Quil — Another chapter shelved with care.
🖋 Quil — Where endings are tidy and legends are footnoted.
🖋 Filed by Quil — Page turned, ledger balanced.
🖋 Quil — The ink rests; the story doesn’t.
